APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOTO, VICENTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED MAR-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THAKOR, KETAN AUTHORIZED AGENT OF BEST HOTEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. KETAN THAKOR AND KIRAN THAKOR APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOTO, VICENTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THAKOR, KETAN AUTHORIZED AGENT OF BEST HOTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
